creator: amendlik@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Cy Schubert from comment #36)

I'm trying to get us on the same page in terms of requirements, outcomes, and test environment. What did you read in my last comment that led you to that conclusion?

Has your advice so far been in support of service ticket-based authentication, or were you assuming I wanted users to be prompted for a password? Am I correct that pam_krb5 will prompt for a password?
